description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe featuring a vibrant woven textile upper with a geometric pattern in blue, beige, and white. The shoe has a rounded toe and a low-cut vamp, with a soft-looking inner lining in a tan color. The trim around the opening is a muted blue, providing a subtle contrast to the patterned fabric. The sole is thin and appears to be made of a light brown rubber or synthetic material, offering flexibility and comfort for walking. The overall design is casual yet stylish, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or casual gatherings. The shoe appears to be in excellent, unworn condition with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A slip-on shoe with a blue, beige, and white geometric woven pattern, trimmed in blue and featuring a thin brown sole. The shoe is new and stylish, ideal for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full geometric pattern, blue trim, and the thin brown sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe and central geometric motif on the upper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the woven pattern and blue trim, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel area with the continuation of the woven pattern and blue trim.
